description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a metallic top and bottom, and a beige label wrapped around its body. The label features the brand name 'RUBINOVA VINJAK' in bold black letters, with 'COLA' highlighted in a red band below. The top rim and bottom edge of the can are accented in a bright magenta color, adding a distinctive visual contrast. The label also includes a crest and the text 'PRODUCT OF SERBIA' along with additional decorative elements and fine print. The can appears to be made of aluminum, typical for beverage containers, and is likely filled with a liquid, possibly a wine-based cola drink.
description: A tall, magenta-accented aluminum can labeled 'RUBINOVA VINJAK COLA' with a beige and red design. The can features a metallic top and bottom and detailed branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full label with 'RUBINOVA VINJAK COLA' and the crest clearly visible, along with magenta accents on the top and bottom.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the curvature of the can and only a partial glimpse of the label text, with the magenta accents still visible.
description_view_2: A slightly rotated view from the front, again showing most of the label, crest, and the magenta accents, but with a more elongated perspective.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, with the label text partially visible and the magenta accents prominent.
attribute_label_or_branding: The label is beige with a red band and magenta accents, featuring the text 'RUBINOVA VINJAK COLA' in bold black and white letters. There is a crest and the phrase 'PRODUCT OF SERBIA' at the top, with additional fine print and decorative lines. The branding is centrally placed and covers most of the can's surface.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Short, straight, and cylindrical with no significant taper; the top is flat with a standard can opening.
